chunks.title: Solomon Assembles the Leaders
chunks.reason: Narrative introduction of Solomon bringing holy items and gathering Israel for the ark's transfer.

chunks.title: The Ark Enters the Temple
chunks.reason: Detailed account of the Levites carrying the ark into the Holy of Holies and its contents.

chunks.title: The Glory Fills the House
chunks.reason: Description of the priests and singers praising God until His glory fills the temple in a cloud.
